hero.title: OpenCode Go
hero.subtitle: Control Desktop OpenCode from Your Phone
hero.description: Left your computer? Take your AI sessions with you. Pair over LAN and continue your OpenCode workflow from anywhere.
hero.feat1: LAN-only, low latency, no cloud needed

items.title: Pairing Code Connect
items.description: IP + Port + 6-digit code — connect to your desktop over LAN instantly

items.title: Streaming AI Responses
items.description: Real-time SSE streaming so you see AI thinking as it happens

items.title: Image Attachment Upload
items.description: Take a photo and send it to AI — your camera becomes an input device

items.title: Tool Step Visibility
items.description: View AI tool calls and execution status, stay in full control

items.title: Conversation History
items.description: Browse all sessions by working directory, revisit any conversation

items.title: Auto-Reconnect
items.description: Automatic reconnect prompt on disconnect, no context lost

steps.title: Start Desktop
steps.description: Launch the Electron app — the embedded OpenCode backend starts automatically

steps.title: Get Connection Info
steps.description: Desktop UI shows your local IP, proxy port, and 6-digit pairing code

steps.title: Enter on Mobile
steps.description: Type IP:Port and pairing code into the mobile app

steps.title: Paired
steps.description: Verified — a secure LAN connection is established

steps.title: Start Chatting
steps.description: Browse working directories, create or continue AI sessions

items.title: Commuting
items.description: Keep the conversation going on the subway — don't break your flow

items.title: Away from Desk
items.description: Browse project sessions from the couch, review AI analysis results

items.title: Photo Analysis
items.description: Snap a screenshot or whiteboard photo, send it straight to AI

download.title: Get Started
download.description: Download the desktop app and mobile app to start your mobile AI workflow
